entries.source: "Ask a teacher for help"
entries.value: "Tambaya a malami don taimako"

entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tambaya me tambayoyi kafin explaining too much."

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Bincika my amsa kafin giving yours."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Give me a mafi wuya version bayan I gwada."

entries.source: "Handle a rude customer"
entries.value: "Magance abokin ciniki mai rashin ladabi"

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Ka sa ya dace da masu farawa."

entries.source: "Negotiate a deadline"
entries.value: "Negotiate a wa’adi"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Amfani da examples daga my exam, aiki, ko daily life."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: Saƙonnin AI

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Nemi a tiny farko task.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End tare da a recap kai write yourself.

entries.source: For Roleplay Scenario, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Ga Yanayin Wasan Kwaikwayo, madaukin atisaye mai amfani shi ne:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Atisaye negotiation, conflict, customer tallafi, leadership, ko any high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good saƙonni usually haɗa three things: the fanni, naka na yanzu mataki, da the kind na taimako kai want. kai kada a buƙata perfect wording. kai only buƙata enough mahaɗi don the zama don begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. tambaya don one example, one rashin fahimta, one bincika tambaya, ko one na gaba mataki. If it feels too mai sauƙi, tambaya don a ƙalubalanci. If it feels too hard, tambaya don a bridge daga abin da kai already know.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Nutsuwa

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Sa the output ƙarin mai amfani

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Roleplay Scenario on inspir.
entries.value: Ra'ayoyin saƙonni da madaukin karatu mai maimaituwa don samun sakamakon koyo mai amfani daga Yanayin Wasan Kwaikwayo a kan inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Karatu an AI response ba the same as learning. bayan the farko amsa, tambaya the mode don sa kai do something tare da the ra’ayi.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Mai alaƙa hanyoyin koyo

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request martani a kan the part that felt marar tabbas.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond kafin asking don the solution.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Saƙonnin Yanayin Wasan Kwaikwayo da madaukin karatu

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Fara tare da one bayyananne request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: State the goal a cikin one sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: dabarun karatu

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Wannan final recap shi ne important. lokacin da kai bayyana the ra’ayi back, kai reveal abin da shi ne solid da abin da shi ne still borrowed daga the AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for roleplay scenario with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Mafi kyau learning sessions suna adjustable. Wannan mode shi ne tuned don wasan kwaikwayo scenario tare da its own saƙonni, examples, da learning flow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Roleplay Scenario is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Fastest way don get value daga wasan kwaikwayo Scenario shi ne don give the AI a aikin koyo, ba kawai a batu. Wani batu says abin da kai suna interested a cikin. Wani aikin koyo says abin da kind na taimako kai buƙata.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Sannan add a constraint that makes the zama ƙarin sirri:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Gwada one na these starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Turn the mode zuwa atisaye

entries.source: Use Roleplay Scenario when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Case Study Simulator. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Amfani da wasan kwaikwayo Scenario lokacin da this shi ne the daidai mode don the job. If kai want a mai alaƙa path, gwada Case karatu mai kwaikwayo. kai can also bincika the koyon AI blog don karatu methods, Socratic learning, katunan tunatarwa, wasan kwaikwayo, da tunawa mai aiki.
